channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [HFCL] HFCL Ltd Delays Completion of Share Purchase Agreement with Trinity Tech Solutions and Nivetti Systems
item.description:
HFCL Ltd has informed about the delay in the completion of the Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) with Trinity Tech Solutions and Nivetti Systems Private Limited. The transaction, previously scheduled to be completed by March 15, 2026, will now be completed on or before June 30, 2026. All other points disclosed as per SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated November 11, 2024, will remain unchanged. This information is based on the intimation dated September 01, 2025.

  • HFCL Ltd delays the completion of the Share Purchase Agreement with Trinity Tech Solutions and Nivetti Systems
  • The transaction was previously scheduled for March 15, 2026, and is now rescheduled for June 30, 2026
  • All other terms and conditions of the SPA remain unchanged as disclosed in the intimation dated September 01, 2025

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HFCL Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [OBEROIRLTY] Oberoi Realty Inks Development Agreement with MHADA for 17.18 Lakh Sq Ft Project in Mumbai
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Oberoi Realty Ltd. has signed a development agreement with Maharashtra Housing and Area Development Authority (MHADA) for lands located at Aram Nagar, Versova, Andheri West, Mumbai. The Company anticipates its share of the free sale component to be approximately 17.18 lakh square feet (RERA carpet area) from the development of the Project Land. This excludes its share of the rehab component for existing tenants, subject to statutory approvals and applicable regulations.

  • Oberoi Realty has entered into a development agreement with MHADA for lands at Aram Nagar, Versova, Andheri West, Mumbai.
  • The Company's share of the free sale component is expected to be around 17.18 lakh square feet (RERA carpet area).
  • The project land development is subject to statutory approvals and applicable regulations.
  • The development includes a rehab component for existing tenants.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OBEROI REALTY LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [THELEELA] Leela Palaces Hotels & Resorts Acquires Ultra-Luxury Resort in Coorg, Karnataka
item.description:
🔥 Trending

The Leela Palaces, Hotels and Resorts, a luxury hospitality brand in India, has announced the acquisition of an ultra-luxury resort in Coorg, Karnataka. The 71 all-villa property, set within 76 acres of lush landscape near Madikeri, will be unveiled as The Leela Coorg Forest Sanctuary later this year. The acquisition marks the brand’s entry into immersive, nature-led and wellness anchored hospitality, and introduces the brand’s first Sanctuary. The property is expected to offer a rare synthesis of wilderness, wellness and warmth of true Indian luxury for travellers who seek space, stillness and a genuine connection to nature.

  • Leela Palaces, Hotels and Resorts acquires an ultra-luxury resort in Coorg, Karnataka
  • The resort, to be named The Leela Coorg Forest Sanctuary, will be unveiled later this year
  • The acquisition marks the brand’s entry into immersive, nature-led and wellness anchored hospitality
  • The property is set within 76 acres of lush landscape near Madikeri and surrounded by coffee and spice plantations
  • The Leela Coorg Forest Sanctuary offers a rare synthesis of wilderness, wellness and warmth of true Indian luxury

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Leela Palaces Hotels & Resorts Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [THELEELA] Leela Palaces Hotels & Resorts Acquires Luxury Resort in Coorg for INR 560 Crores
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Leela Palaces Hotels & Resorts Ltd has announced the acquisition of a luxury resort in Coorg, Karnataka, from Pai Vista Hotels Private Limited. The acquisition also includes certain other land parcels and identified assets and liabilities. The total consideration for the transaction is up to INR 560,00,00,000, subject to post-closing adjustments. The transaction was approved by the Board of Directors of Leela Luxe Hotels & Resorts Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of the company, and was funded through an equity infusion and a debt facility from the company.

  • Leela Palaces Hotels & Resorts Ltd is acquiring a luxury resort in Coorg, Karnataka, for INR 560 Crores.
  • The acquisition also includes certain other land parcels and identified assets and liabilities.
  • The transaction was funded through an equity infusion and a debt facility from the company.
  • The acquisition was approved by the Board of Directors of Leela Luxe Hotels & Resorts Private Limited.
  • The transaction is implemented subject to the terms and conditions set forth in the respective Transaction Agreements.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Leela Palaces Hotels & Resorts Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ZYDUSLIFE] Zydus Lifesciences Subsidiary Sentynl Therapeutics to Acquire Full Rights to Progerinin for Hutchinson-Gilford Progeria Syndrome Treatment
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sentynl Therapeutics, a subsidiary of Zydus Lifesciences Limited, has entered into an agreement with PRG S&T to license the investigational molecule Progerinin (SLC-D011) for Hutchinson-Gilford Progeria Syndrome (HGPS). Upon meeting certain milestones, Sentynl will acquire full rights to the molecule for HGPS, making it the company's second therapy intended for the treatment of HGPS. Progerinin is designed to inhibit the interaction and harmful effects of progerin within cells, thereby improving nuclear integrity and reducing cellular damage. The program is currently finalizing a Phase 2A clinical trial, and data are expected before the end of 1H 2026.

  • Sentynl Therapeutics, a subsidiary of Zydus Lifesciences Limited, will acquire full rights to Progerinin (SLC-D011) for Hutchinson-Gilford Progeria Syndrome (HGPS) treatment.
  • Progerinin is an investigational, orally active small-molecule drug being developed as a potential treatment for HGPS.
  • The acquisition is subject to certain milestones being met, with data expected from a Phase 2A clinical trial before the end of 1H 2026.
  • Progerinin is designed to inhibit the interaction and harmful effects of progerin within cells, improving nuclear integrity and reducing cellular damage.
  • Zokinvy® (lonafarnib) is currently the only approved treatment for HGPS and certain processing-deficient Progeroid Laminopathies in multiple countries.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zydus Lifesciences Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [PROZONINTU] Prozone Realty Acquires Major Stake in Three Subsidiaries for Over INR 31 Crores
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Prozone Realty Ltd. has announced the acquisition of significant equity shares in three material subsidiaries: Hagwood Commercial Developers Private Limited, Alliance Mall Developers Co. Pvt. Ltd., and Empire Mall Private Limited. The transactions amount to over INR 31 crores. This strategic move aims to increase the company's ownership, consolidate its position, and provide exit opportunities to foreign shareholders. The acquisitions are not related party transactions and are expected to be completed within 45 days of the board resolutions. The companies being acquired are engaged in developing, owning, and operating shopping malls and residential and commercial premises.

  • Prozone Realty to acquire 38.50% equity shareholding in Hagwood Commercial Developers Private Limited from TREIIL and Pearlscope
  • Kruti Realtors and Developers Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of Prozone Realty, to acquire 38.50% equity shareholding in Alliance Mall Developers Co. Pvt. Ltd. from TREIHL and Pearlscope, and 65.29% equity shareholding in Empire Mall Private Limited from Triangle, Pearlscope, and Nailsfield
  • The total transaction amount is over INR 31 crores
  • The acquisitions are expected to be completed within 45 days of the board resolutions
  • The companies being acquired are engaged in developing, owning, and operating shopping malls and residential and commercial premises

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Prozone Intu Properties Limited | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [THELEELA] Leela Palaces Hotels & Resorts Invests INR 231.2 Crores in Wholly Owned Subsidiary Leela Luxe Hotels & Resorts
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Leela Palaces Hotels & Resorts Ltd. has approved an investment in its wholly owned subsidiary, Leela Luxe Hotels & Resorts Private Limited (LLHRPL). The Company acquired 2,31,20,000 equity shares of LLHRPL at a price of INR 100 per share, including a premium of INR 90 per share. The total consideration for the investment is INR 2,31,20,00,000. The investment is made for strategic initiatives, development, expansion, refurbishments, and other capital expenditure outside the main line of business of the listed entity. LLHRPL operates in the hospitality sector and was incorporated in India on November 28, 2025. There has been no change in the shareholding of the Company in LLHRPL, which continues to be a wholly owned subsidiary.

  • Leela Palaces Hotels & Resorts invests INR 231.2 crores in Leela Luxe Hotels & Resorts
  • Investment made through a rights issue at INR 100 per share with a premium of INR 90 per share
  • Investment aims to support strategic initiatives, development, expansion, and refurbishments
  • Leela Luxe Hotels & Resorts is a wholly owned subsidiary of Leela Palaces Hotels & Resorts
  • Leela Luxe Hotels & Resorts operates in the hospitality sector and was incorporated in India in 2025

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Leela Palaces Hotels & Resorts Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [TIMEX] Timex Group India Ltd. to Consider Interim Dividend Payment and Redemption of Preference Shares
item.description:
Timex Group India Ltd. has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on March 20, 2026, to consider the approval of an interim dividend payment on 2,29,00,000 13.88% Cumulative Redeemable Preference Shares (unlisted shares) and the redemption of these preference shares. The record date for determining the holders of preference shares eligible to receive dividend and redemption proceeds has been set as March 20, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the shares of the company will be closed from March 16, 2026, to March 22, 2026, due to the dividend declaration.

  • Timex Group India Ltd. to consider interim dividend payment on 2,29,00,000 13.88% Cumulative Redeemable Preference Shares
  • The company to redeem the aforementioned preference shares
  • Record date set as March 20, 2026, for determining eligible preference shareholders
  • Trading window for dealing in the company's shares to be closed from March 16, 2026, to March 22, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TIMEX GROUP INDIA LTD.-$ | Category: Dividend

item.title: [DRA] DRA Consultants Ltd Schedules Board Meeting on March 24, 2026
item.description:
DRA Consultants Ltd has informed the BSE that its Board of Directors will meet on March 24, 2026, to review the business operations and consider any other matter with the Chair's permission. The meeting will take place at the company's registered office in Nagpur, Maharashtra.

  • DRA Consultants Ltd has scheduled a Board Meeting on March 24, 2026
  • The meeting will be held at the company's registered office in Nagpur, Maharashtra
  • The Board will review the business operations of the company
  • The meeting will also consider any other matter with the Chair's permission

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DRA Consultants Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [IBREALEST] Embassy Developments Ltd Allots INR 25 Crores Non-Convertible Debentures
item.description:
Embassy Developments Ltd has approved the allotment of 2,500 non-convertible debentures of face value INR 1,00,000/- each, amounting to INR 25 crores, on a private placement basis. The debentures will have a tenure of 40 months and 15 days, starting from the date of allotment, and will be secured by a charge on the identified assets of the Company. The coupon rate offered is 11% per annum, paid quarterly after a moratorium of 6 months.

  • Embassy Developments Ltd allots INR 25 Crores non-convertible debentures
  • 2,500 debentures of face value INR 1,00,000/- each
  • Tenure of 40 months and 15 days from the date of allotment
  • Coupon rate of 11% per annum, paid quarterly after a moratorium of 6 months
  • Secured by a charge on the identified assets of the Company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIABULLS REAL ESTATE LTD. | Category: Investment
